recommendations.title: The Monster Project
recommendations.overview: A group of aspiring filmmakers interview three individuals who claim to be monsters. However, unique incidents start to occur when they start filming.

recommendations.title: The Gorgon
recommendations.overview: In the early 20th century a village experienced a series of inexplicable murders. All the victims were young men who had been turned to stone. The perpetrator of these deaths was a being so repulsive that she transformed the onlooker using the power

recommendations.title: Cult of Chucky
recommendations.overview: Confined to an asylum for the criminally insane for the past four years, Nica is wrongly convinced that she, not Chucky, murdered her entire family... until a string of grisly deaths occur after her psychiatrist introduces a new group therapy tool --

recommendations.title: Dead Awake
recommendations.overview: Kate Bowman (Jocelin Donahue) is an average social worker who, after the sudden death of her twin sister, is investigating the mysterious deaths of other people who died in their sleep. Shortly before their deaths, the victims all reported a supernat

recommendations.title: One Missed Call
recommendations.overview: Several people start receiving voice-mails from their future selves -- messages which include the date, time, and some of the details of their deaths.

recommendations.title: Afflicted
recommendations.overview: Two friends' tour of Europe takes a dark turn when one of them contracts a mysterious illness. They race to find out what it is and how to cure it before the sickness consumes him completely.

recommendations.title: Shortcut
recommendations.overview: A group of five classmates is trapped inside their school bus after an encounter with a mysterious creature on the road. Amid constant threats from the creature, the teen's anxiety increases while their survival chances decrease.

recommendations.title: The Fog
recommendations.overview: Strange things begin to occur as a tiny California coastal town prepares to commemorate its centenary. Inanimate objects spring eerily to life; Rev. Malone stumbles upon a dark secret about the town's founding; radio announcer Stevie witnesses a myst

recommendations.title: Twins of Evil
recommendations.overview: While dabbling in Satanism, Count Karstein resurrects Mircalla Karnstein who initiates him into vampirism. As a rash of deaths afflicts the village, Gustav the head of Puritan group leads his men to seek out and destroy the pestilence. One of his twi

recommendations.title: The Golem: How He Came Into the World
recommendations.overview: In 16th-century Prague, a rabbi creates the Golem - a giant creature made of clay. Using sorcery, he brings the creature to life in order to protect the Jews of Prague from persecution.
